历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17778 → 16211 → 15373 → 15454 → 15902, showing a fluctuating forward trend (decreasing ranking number), with a cumulative forward shift of about 2400 places from 2021 to 2023, and a slight backward shift in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 15902; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 10 in 2021, expanded to 20 in 2022, and stabilized at 21 from 2023 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, a small expansion of 1 (about +4.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and tends to increase the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 60th, with recent rankings stable in the 55–67 range, indicating a solid school level; no significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years; comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 78th (rated 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms; no records of enrollment gaps or admission anomalies, overall reputation stable; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university, so direct citation is not possible; however, as the only 211 medical university in the country, its core disciplines such as clinical medicine and stomatology are highly recognized within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine remains highly popular (2024), stomatology is continuously recommended (72.31), nursing is recommended (68.61), and the overall application enthusiasm for medical majors remains high; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,600, roughly the same as 2025; Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, adjacent to Liaoning Province with similar culture, naturally attracting Liaoning examinees; the university is in Liaoning.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the small expansion of the Physics Category plan in 2026 (+1), the sustained high popularity of medical majors, the basically unchanged total number of examinees, and the stable school reputation; taking into account the rising medical enthusiasm and the scarcity of this 211 medical university, the ranking is expected to shift forward by about 50 places. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 16306, with a range of 15806–16806.
